tradeDress.name: Bored OpenClaw Users House Trade Dress
tradeDress.identity: Bored OpenClaw Users wordmark or emblem
tradeDress.logoStyle: full set name wordmark or emblem, not the internal abbreviation
tradeDress.border: chrome border with terminal corners and tech-ui ticks
tradeDress.backFrame: two-column stats grid with a flavor strip and serial rail
tradeDress.motif: terminal UI, chat, and developer-tool cues
tradeDress.accentPalette: ink black, chrome silver, electric blue, and purple
tradeDress.baseRule: Base cards should carry the house identity prominently and read as one family.
tradeDress.variantRule: Variants should keep the logo and rail language readable unless they are intentionally premium.
tradeDress.premiumRule: High-end variants can break the base dress and use a stronger finish-specific frame.
tradeDress.logoRule: Use the full set name or emblem on cards; do not print the internal code.
tradeDress.notes: Use a coherent house style for the set while allowing chase parallels to overtake the frame when needed.
